title: ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - cDNA Library Purification and Ligation
author: Opentrons

steps.title: With this 4 part workflow, the...
steps.instruction: With this 4 part workflow, the OT-2 will follow [ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Pre-PCR Instrument experimental protocol](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2022-01-06/0h134y4/ArcBio_RNA_Workflow_Continuous.xlsx) to convert up to 96 input RNA samples into cDNA libraries. This is Part 4 of 4: This OT-2 protocol uses the RNA Continuous Workflow, Pre-PCR Instrument section of attached experimental protocol to perform Library Purification, Ligation.

steps.title: Bead cleanup and elution with Tris
steps.instruction: Bead cleanup and elution with Tris.

steps.title: Add enzyme 16
steps.instruction: Add enzyme 16. Pause for off-deck thermocycler steps.
